content.fact: Luke Skywalker leads a divided, embattled Jedi Order through philosophical and military crisis.
content.injection: Write NJO Luke as burdened by leadership, public blame, and Jedi policy conflict, not as a solitary farmboy adventurer. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.

entries.title: Anakin Young Jedi Leader Before Death

content.fact: Before Myrkr, Anakin Solo is a gifted young Jedi often treated as a natural leader among his generation.

entries.title: Ganner Rhysode Last Stand Becomes Mythic

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.

content.fact: Ganner Rhysode’s stand during Jacen’s escape becomes a mythic marker of Jedi courage in Yuuzhan Vong perception.
content.injection: After Ganner’s last stand, his death can carry legendary resonance; before that, do not treat him as already mythic.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Jacen Captive / Traitor.
